description: FGAP-037: enforce three-view measurement (student outcomes, staff/adult practice, parent/stakeholder) as a generation contract + a per-spec in-execution self-check on the measurement-bearing step, mirroring the T3/T4 pattern; produce the currently-absent parent/stakeholder track and gate its omission.
acceptance_criteria: During generation of the measurement-bearing step, the step's self-check fails when any of the three measurement views -- student outcomes, staff/adult practice, parent/stakeholder -- is neither produced nor recorded as an explicit not-this-cycle gap, and passes when each is one or the other; demonstrated on an input that would otherwise omit the parent/stakeholder view.
Over a full assembled draft, each of the three measurement views is present or recorded as an explicit gap, confirmed by a whole-draft check.

A generated plan produces a parent/stakeholder measurement track (a parent feedback channel, a parent-facing measure, or an explicit gap), not parents only as a communication audience; confirmed by reading the draft.

No previously-passing check moves from passing to failing: outputs parse, the catalogue-gate raises no new rejection, the parity gate passes 14/14, the project gate is green, and every existing in-execution and whole-draft check stays passing.
